name: Group By RFM Features
description: This node computes feature engineering tasks such as group by, frequency, recency, average days between purchases, total value of purchases, and customer age. These are computed per user using the selected operations.
input: It takes DataFrame(s) as input for processing.
output: Returns engineered features as a DataFrame.

fields.name: frequency
fields.title: Enable Frequency
fields.description: Enable frequency count per user ID

fields.name: recency
fields.title: Enable Recency
fields.description: Enable recency computation (last purchase date) per user ID

fields.name: recencyDateCol
fields.title: Recency Date Column
fields.description: Date column to compute recency from

fields.name: avgDaysBetween
fields.title: Enable Avg Days Between
fields.description: Enable computation of average days between purchases

fields.name: avgDaysDateCol
fields.title: Avg Days Date Column
fields.description: Date column to compute average days between

fields.name: valueOfPurchase
fields.title: Enable Value of Purchase
fields.description: Enable total value of purchase per user

fields.name: sumCols
fields.title: Columns to Sum
fields.description: Numeric columns to sum per user

fields.name: customerAge
fields.title: Enable Customer Age
fields.description: Compute age of customer from DOB
